arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal confident over big name and also want to sign £50m Premier League star
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly confident over keeping hold of William Saliba despite ongoing transfer interest from Real Madrid. On top of that, it’s being claimed that the Gunners want to sign £50m-rated Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen to play alongside both Saliba and Gabriel, rather than replace either of them. That’s according to the Athletic, who state […] The post Report: Arsenal confident over big name and also want to sign £50m Premier League star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal Betting Preview: Get 50/1 on a goal to be scored with Paddy Power
arts.sum: Arsenal head to the Santiago Bernabeu tonight defending a 3-0 lead in the Champions League quarter-final. The Gunners ripped apart Real Madrid, the defending European champions, in a dazzling second ...

arts.ttl: South American says he had chance to leave Manchester United for Real Madrid – Family convinced him to stay
arts.sum: Manchester United favourite Antonio Valencia has admitted he had the chance to join Real Madrid, but his family convinced him to stay where he was. Marca cover comments from the Ecuador defender today as he speaks about Manchester United, Real Madrid vs Arsenal and how he nearly joined the Spanish giants. arts.sum: Arsenal are looking for attacking reinforcements in the summer transfer window and supporters have been interested to hear that Jacob Ramsey is in the same camp as Ollie Watkins

arts.ttl: Arsenal supporters serenade Declan Rice with brilliant new chant about his free-kicks as they pack bars in Madrid ahead of Champions League decider
arts.sum: Arsenal fans are taking over Madrid, packing the local bars and have even been serenading the locals with a brilliant new chant about Declan Rice. The crucial second leg takes place tonight.

arts.ttl: Mbappe available for Copa del Rey final despite one-game ban
arts.sum: Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappe will be available for the Copa del Rey final against Barcelona after receiving one-match ban for red card against Alaves.

arts.ttl: Liverpool star follows Van Dijk example and rejects Real Madrid
arts.sum: Liverpool star follows Van Dijk example and rejects Real Madrid And Alexis Mac Allister is set to follow the example of Liverpool’s captain by rejecting the opportunity of going to the Champions League quarter-finalists.
